misc.text: [#ONEPIEC1183] GOT IT YALL, ODA TRULY MUSIC HEAD!!! In real world, Dozan is actual person and his name is Dozan fujiwara & known as the prince of traditional Japanese music!!!! He is known to play what is called Shakuhachi aka the flute. So it seem Oda is applying this music theme with the Gods.
